description: Data Export & Reporting Features - Export trade data to CSV/JSON, generate performance PDF reports, and export evolution history

userStories.title: Create trade data export functionality
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to export my trade data for offline analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept date range and symbol filter parameters
Fetch trades from GET /trades/recent with filters
Format CSV with headers: ticket, symbol, side, entryPrice, exitPrice, pnl, entryTime, exitTime
Format JSON with full trade objects
Add download trigger with filename format: trades_YYYY-MM-DD.csv
Add export button to RecentTrades component
Verify in browser that export works

userStories.title: Create performance report PDF export
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to generate a PDF performance report.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate PDF with title, date range, metrics summary
Embed equity curve chart as image
Add download trigger with filename: performance_report_YYYY-MM-DD.pdf
Add export button to performance section
Use jsPDF or similar PDF library
Verify in browser that PDF generates correctly

userStories.title: Create evolution history export
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to export evolution history data.
acceptanceCriteria: Format CSV with generation number, fitness, decision, timestamp
Format JSON with full evolution objects
Add download trigger with filename: evolution_YYYY-MM-DD.csv
Add export button to evolution section
Verify in browser that export works
